strengths: Experience with Snowflake and cloud data
weaknesses: No explicit data governance framework experience
improvement_bullets: Developed robust data pipelines in Snowflake and Python to support automated classification engines, ensuring data integrity and consistency across high-volume datasets.
Applied data governance principles to document and maintain technical SOPs, ensuring schema standardization and improved data quality for downstream reporting.
Transformed complex marketing datasets using Python and SQL to implement classification logic, enabling precise customer segmentation and campaign performance tracking.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate media data sources, utilizing advanced transformation rules to ensure reliable data models for business intelligence.
Conducted rigorous QA and validation processes on large-scale datasets, leveraging analytical tools to troubleshoot issues and maintain data accuracy in line with governance standards.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Analyst, Data Enablement opportunity with Publicis Health Media. I am interested in this opportunity because of PHM’s commitment to transforming data into actionable direction within the complex healthcare media landscape. What interests me about working for Publicis Health Media is its focus on the intersection of data, creativity, and storytelling to solve real-world health challenges; this mission resonates deeply with my background in building data-driven products that bridge technical infrastructure with business needs. I believe my expertise in architecting scalable data pipelines and my proficiency in SQL and Python would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on the underlying data architecture to drive operational efficiency. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in our data processing, which led me to design and implement automated ETL pipelines that replaced manual reporting workflows. This effort reduced data processing time by 40% and improved KPI visibility for executive decision-making, showcasing the direct impact of robust data enablement. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Analyst, Data Enablement role at Publicis Health Media would allow me to bring my experience in pipeline optimization to the development of your core data products. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my data governance and quality assurance skills. I collaborated with Product and Underwriting teams to reconcile large insurance datasets, where I optimized relational database queries to clean and integrate multi-source data. This work improved overall data accuracy by 30%, ensuring that stakeholders had access to reliable, well-documented schemas for their analysis. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in data modeling and classification logic to assist in evolving PHM’s classification engine and data infrastructure. I know that my technical versatility and commitment to data integrity align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Analyst, Data Enablement role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
